lint.command: ROOT="/home/realnigga/Desktop/Mission-control" && cd "$ROOT" && bash ci/lint-knowledgebase.sh && bash ci/check-architecture.sh && bash ci/check-enterprise-policy.sh && bash ci/check-orchestrator-layer.sh && python3 scripts/check_flaky_tags.py --tests-root erp-domain/src/test/java --gate gate-fast && bash scripts/guard_openapi_contract_drift.sh

blockingIssues.description: `.factory/library/frontend-handoff.md` still documents nonexistent `POST /api/v1/dispatch/confirm` response fields (`packingSlipId`, `salesOrderId`, `finalInvoiceId`, `arJournalEntryId`) instead of the live `DispatchConfirmationResponse`/OpenAPI shape, so docs/library/OpenAPI do not yet teach one consistent dispatch contract.

The O2C handoff flow still tells consumers to read `finalInvoiceId` from `POST /api/v1/dispatch/confirm`, but that field is not returned by the endpoint, leaving the onboarding-to-dispatch guidance inconsistent with runtime/OpenAPI truth.

appliedUpdates.description: Added `commands.targeted-orchestrator-dispatch-proof` so workers have a named proof pack for the orchestrator fail-closed dispatch regression suite (`OrchestratorControllerIT`, `IntegrationCoordinatorTest`, `CommandDispatcherTest`, and related truthsuite coverage).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a dispatch DTO parity guard or equivalent review rule for shared handoff/library docs that enumerate `DispatchConfirmationResponse` fields, because route-literal-only guards are not enough to keep the canonical dispatch response story aligned.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The review for `dispatch-surface-hardcut-and-flow-alignment` found `.factory/library/frontend-handoff.md` still promised nonexistent `finalInvoiceId`/`arJournalEntryId` fields even though `scripts/guard_workflow_canonical_paths.sh` passed and the runtime/OpenAPI contract disagreed.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify how `.factory/library/*`-only docs packets should be validated so workers do not escalate them to `gate_fast.sh` when the intended proof lane is docs lint plus seam-specific contract guards.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The review for `dispatch-retired-seam-docs-alignment` found mission/docs-worker guidance ambiguity around `.factory/library/*` packets, which led the worker to run `gate_fast.sh` even though the feature-specific proof was docs lint plus dispatch contract guards.

rejectedObservations.observation: At the time of `orchestrator-dispatch-failclosed-retirement`, shared docs/library still referenced `DispatchRequest`/`dispatchBatch`.
An older validation artifact under `.factory/validation/remove-noncanonical-dispatch-path/user-testing/flows/orchestrator-cleanup.json` still mentions the retired dispatch shortcut.
